title: Pocket Groove Rock (Style prompt only)
prompt: Create a pocket groove rock track with deep in-the-pocket backbeat, ghost-note snare, syncopated bass pushes. Use dry crunchy rhythm guitars with short stabs and bluesy fills; rubbery bassline locked to kick, tight organic drums, minimal fills. Lead vocal: raspy confident male vocal with restrained swagger. Production: warm analog rock mix, close drum room, light tape saturation. BPM: 100, Key: D minor. Make the chorus memorable without becoming generic pop.
exclude: EDM drop, trap hi-hats, Japanese vocals, idol-pop brightness, over-polished pop sheen
lyrics_direction: Lyrics should feel direct, physical, road-worn, with short hook phrases and no fantasy language.
source_note: 海外ロックのジャンル特徴をもとにしたオリジナル整理版プロンプト。

title: Pocket Groove Rock (Detailed arrangement)
prompt: Create a pocket groove rock song. Intro: establish the groove with drums and bass first. Verse: dry crunchy rhythm guitars with short stabs and bluesy fills in a restrained pattern. Pre-chorus: add tension with rising dynamics. Chorus: open into a bigger guitar hook while the rhythm stays deep in-the-pocket backbeat, ghost-note snare, syncopated bass pushes. Bridge: strip down to bass/drums, then rebuild into the final chorus. Vocal: raspy confident male vocal with restrained swagger. Production: warm analog rock mix, close drum room, light tape saturation. BPM: 106, Key: E minor.
exclude: EDM drop, trap hi-hats, Japanese vocals, idol-pop brightness, over-polished pop sheen
